creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: Thank you for providing stable/13 users with this solution. I did a quick test yesterday and complained to the committer that it was broken, but I was wrong. The implementation is operational between two stable/13 nodes, but cannot interoperate with other implementations including if_wg(4) from CURRENT, net/wireguard-kmod from ports and probably it will not work with Linux peers either.
